title: Infosys completes extinguishment of 100,000,000 shares under buyback
detailed_summary: Infosys completed the extinguishment of 100,000,000 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each bought back through the tender offer route. The buyback tendering period opened on Thursday, November 20, 2025 and closed on Wednesday, November 26, 2025. Equity share capital was 4,15,44,01,349 shares as on the buyback record date of November 14, 2025, and became 4,05,46,24,409 shares after extinguishment, inclusive of 2,23,060 equity shares allotted pursuant to exercise of RSUs. The certificate states the shares were extinguished on December 4, 2025 in dematerialized form.

key_facts.fact: Infosys completed the extinguishment of 100,000,000 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each bought back through the tender offer route.
The buyback tendering period opened on Thursday, November 20, 2025, and closed on Wednesday, November 26, 2025.
Equity share capital before extinguishment was 4,15,44,01,349 shares as on the Record Date of the Buyback i.e., November 14, 2025.
Equity share capital after extinguishment was 4,05,46,24,409 shares, inclusive of 2,23,060 Equity Shares allotted pursuant to exercise of RSUs.
100,000,000 equity shares were extinguished in dematerialized form on December 4, 2025.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys completed extinguishment of equity shares bought back by way of the tender offer route; 100,000,000 equity shares were extinguished and equity share capital after extinguishment was 4,05,46,24,409 shares.
corporate_actions.amount_or_ratio: 100,000,000 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each
